items.title: Nigeria rescues dozens of abducted school children in Oyo state
items.summary: Nigerian security forces have rescued 39 schoolchildren and five teachers abducted nearly two months ago in Oyo state.

items.title: US launches fresh strikes as Iran closes Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: The strikes follow an attack on a Cyrpus-flagged vessel travelling through the critical waterway.
